untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders Bottom requires multi-bar structural pattern recognition (left shoulder, head, right shoulder, neckline geometry). Available indicators cannot explicitly detect the shoulder-head-shoulder formation or neckline construction. The exact measurement rule for price targets (vertical distance from head low to neckline, projected upward) cannot be calculated with available indicators. Converted entry conditions are approximations only: oversold state (price_pos_20 < 0.2), neckline breakout proxy (close crosses above sma_20), and volume confirmation.
